name: Team Management - New Requirement Alert
subject: New Requirement Raised: {{ doc.requirement_title }}
message:
A new requirement {{ doc.requirement_title }} has been raised by {{ doc.requested_by }}.

Priority: {{ doc.priority }}
Due Date: {{ doc.due_date }}

name: Team Management - New Assignment Alert
subject: New Work Assigned: {{ doc.name }}
message:
You have been assigned new work by {{ doc.assigned_by }}.

Priority: {{ doc.priority }}
Due Date: {{ doc.due_date }}

{{ doc.instructions }}

name: Team Management - Task Completed Alert
subject: Task Completed: {{ doc.name }}
message: {{ doc.assigned_to }} has marked assignment {{ doc.name }} as Completed.
